nws_forecast.name: Today
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly sunny, with a high near 46. South wind 8 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Tonight
nws_forecast.detailed: Patchy fog between midnight and 3am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 26. West wind around 8 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday
nws_forecast.detailed: Snow likely after 9am. Mostly cloudy. High near 35, with temperatures falling to around 28 in the afternoon. North wind around 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New snow accumulation of 1 to 2 inches possible.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Chance Light Snow then Partly Cloudy
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of snow before 10pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 11. Wind chill values as low as -2. Northwest wind around 13 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New snow accumulation of less than half an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Monday
nws_forecast.detailed: Sunny, with a high near 25. Northwest wind 6 to 10 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Monday Night

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday

nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of snow between noon and 2pm, then a chance of rain. Partly sunny, with a high near 40. Southwest wind 7 to 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday Night
